title: MCP Server-Orchestrator
description: Started as a freelance solution and scaled into a comprehensive ecosystem for orchestrating AI servers using the Model Context Protocol.

title: SMA — Social Media Analytics
description: AI-powered social media scraping and sentiment analysis platform. Multi-account management, engagement metrics, word clouds and an embedded AI assistant trained on your own data.

title: Clinician UI
description: Migration from a legacy PHP monolith to a modern micro-frontend shell. Responsible for the core App Shell architecture and a zero-downtime CI/CD pipeline on Azure.

title: Tembiapo
description: Two-sided marketplace connecting skilled tradespeople with clients across NEA, Argentina. Handles identity verification, direct WhatsApp contact, and service guarantees.

title: Sierra Ski Tech
description: Rapid internal tool built while working as a ski instructor to eliminate scheduling friction. Shipped in days and immediately adopted by the instructor team.

title: Obras
description: Full-stack project management system built at record speed for a construction company. Led data architecture and backend; Gonza Mata handled the frontend.
